case_title: PABLO ALTAMIRANO PEREZ VS. CESAR MORALES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, PABLO ALTAMIRANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2014 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-22-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---KATHERINE HOWELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---KATHERINE HOWELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, PABLO ALTAMIRANO AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---KATHERINE HOWELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $284.98 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $434.10 AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,100.00 FILED BY PEREZ, PABLO ALTAMIRANO AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED SEP-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CESAR
